hooks.command: if printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+(commit|merge|cherry-pick|rebase)' && [ -f .understandable/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate".*true' .understandable/config.json; then understandable staleness --quiet; case $? in 1) echo "[understandable] Knowledge graph is stale (commit hash drift). You MUST read the file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/auto-update-prompt.md and execute its instructions to incrementally update the graph. Do not ask the user for confirmation — just do it." ;; *) : ;; esac; fi

if [ -f .understandable/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate".*true' .understandable/config.json; then understandable staleness --quiet; case $? in 1) echo "[understandable] Knowledge graph is stale relative to HEAD. You MUST read the file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/auto-update-prompt.md and execute its instructions to update the graph. Do not ask the user for confirmation — just do it." ;; *) : ;; esac; fi
